summary: 独立 QA 复核拒收当前 M7 UI 回归矩阵。分支范围、writer handoff schema、任务 JSON、禁止路径、发布/遥测/账户/云存档/商业流程边界均通过核对；新增 Playwright 覆盖也保持在 DOM/read-model 可观察行为层面，没有探入 sim-core 权威状态或 Pixi 内部。但新增矩阵用例在同一个 page 循环中反复注册持久 page.addInitScript，后续导航会同时执行多个写入同一 localStorage key 和 navigator locale getter 的 init script。Playwright 1.61 本地类型文档声明多个 init script 的执行顺序未定义，因此该矩阵的 en-US/zh-CN/system 场景隔离不确定，不能作为 Beta 本地化回归门禁接受。

tests_run.result: ## codex/m7-ui-regression-matrix...origin/codex/m7-ui-regression-matrix; no dirty tracked or untracked work before QA handoff write.
Diff confined to allowed task/process/message paths and tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts; no forbidden paths listed.
No whitespace or patch formatting errors.
VALID writer handoff; status REVIEW and route_to qa_reviewer.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001

tests_run.result: Reviewed the single product/test diff; only one new Playwright test and helper were added.
HEAD is 12852d8f (origin/codex/m7-ui-regression-matrix), a newer relevant QA routing commit after writer handoff commit 4c8e6786.

No forbidden path output for sim-core, sim-ai, protocol, save-format, content packages, apps/sim-runner, apps/content-tools, content-source, tools, .github, frozen docs, PROJECT_STATUS, manifests, or validation reports.
Focused Chromium Playwright test passed once: 1 passed (3.1s). This confirms current behavior can pass but does not remove the init-script isolation defect.

tests_run.command: Select-String on local Playwright 1.61.0 types.d.ts for addInitScript order note
tests_run.result: types.d.ts documents that the order of evaluation of multiple scripts installed via browserContext.addInitScript and page.addInitScript is not defined.

decisions.result: REQUEST_CHANGES because the regression matrix's locale scenarios are not isolated deterministically.

Diff stays within allowed paths; no product code, release, signing, update, telemetry, account, cloud-save, commercial, sim-core, protocol, save, content, CI, roadmap, gate, or acceptance-matrix changes were added.

The new test uses observable DOM attributes, visible text, localStorage, and page errors only; it does not inspect authoritative WorldState, Pixi DisplayObject internals, or sim-core implementation details.

Remaining Firefox, Edge, Windows DPI, and full platform/resolution localization coverage is correctly left as risk for M7-PLATFORM-RESOLUTION-LOCALIZATION-MATRIX-001 rather than absorbed into this task.

risks: Chromium-only coverage remains acceptable for this task only because the task explicitly records Firefox/Edge/DPI/localization permutations as follow-up platform-matrix risk.

The current visible-text raw-key scan would not catch every possible bare key in non-visible accessible labels; after fixing scenario isolation, consider scanning relevant aria-label/title/placeholder text if the writer wants stronger no-bare-key coverage.

blockers.symbol: M7 UI regression matrix stays localized, console-clean, and key-free across supported viewports
blockers.repro: Inspect lines 1072-1088: each loop iteration calls page.addInitScript on the same page, setting monsoon.client.localePreference.v1 and overriding navigator.languages/language. Then later iterations call page.goto('/') with all prior init scripts still registered. Local Playwright 1.61 types.d.ts states the order of evaluation of multiple page/context init scripts is not defined.
blockers.impact: The English, Simplified Chinese, and system-language scenarios are not isolated deterministic inputs. Depending on init-script evaluation order, a later scenario can boot with an earlier scenario's localStorage value or navigator locale override, so the regression matrix may fail intermittently or validate the wrong locale path.
blockers.required_fix: Refactor the matrix so each scenario has isolated setup. Acceptable fixes include creating a fresh page or browser context per scenario, disposing the previous addInitScript Disposable before the next navigation, or using one stable init script whose data is set deterministically before navigation. Re-run the focused e2e and required validation commands after the fix.

requested_action: Fix the Playwright locale scenario isolation defect in tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts, rerun the focused M7 UI regression matrix test plus required gates, and submit an updated writer handoff for QA review.
